summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations are planned. Security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; unrelated non-security PRs are kept open as independent or related work because this is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix/low-signal close actions are disabled.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive governance/DLP/dependency-boundary surface is outside Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Related to the terminal chat ACK/client-send family, but not safe to close as superseded from this shard because it is draft and may retain narrow Android behavior not proven covered by #91049.
Plugin API session reset changes touch session-state and gateway/plugin security boundary surfaces, so the exact PR should be routed to central security handling.
Best open Discord DM read fix path in the hydrated related set; keep it open for maintainer validation rather than close or merge in plan mode.
Distinct doctor/gateway-services feature work with no duplicate closeout target and no merge permission in this job.
Independent Teams rendering feature; failing proof and review needs block merge-style outcomes but do not justify closure.
Distinct Teams identity feature with useful active work; no duplicate or low-signal closure basis in this inventory shard.
Related to the structured doctor health work family, but draft and not a clear duplicate or closure candidate.
Small independent maintainer test-stabilization PR; keep open for maintainer review.
Broad control-plane hardening/security-boundary work belongs in central security handling, not PR inventory cleanup.
